series_metadata.series_description: File consists of applications for public water system modifications or construction plan approvals. Includes specifications, written descriptions, blueprints, and copy of final approval letter from Director.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: copy in office updated obsolete or superseded ; Paper: in office 60 days issuance or formal director's action or any appeals are resolved. Microfilm blueprints only; blueprints and all other documents microfilm has been checked quality and completeness
